ogTitle: Valery vs Valla Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Valery and Valla Beach.
heading: Valery vs Valla Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Valery, New South Wales and Valla Beach, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Valery has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Valla Beach (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Valery or Valla Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Valery has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Valla Beach scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Valery scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Valla Beach scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Valery or Valla Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Valery has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
